nasb.text: So then, those who had received his word were baptized; and that day there were added about three thousand souls.

esv.text: So those who received his word were baptized, and there were added that day about three thousand souls.

cnv.text: 於是接受他話的人都受了洗，那一天門徒增加了約三千人。

ccb.text: 结果，那天约有三千人相信了他传的道，接受了洗礼。

csbs.text: 于是领受他话的人就受了洗；那一天大约增加了三千人。
